untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit range_boundaries, lower_end_threshold, and upper_end_threshold parameters which are marked AUTHOR_SILENT. Donchian Channels used as proxy for range detection, but without explicit threshold values the precise entry/exit points cannot be accurately determined.
translation_notes: GUJRAL_DRY_5 is a mean-reversion range-trading strategy. Used Donchian Channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) as a proxy for range boundaries since explicit range definition parameters were not provided. Buy when price reaches lower band, sell when price reaches upper band. Exit conditions implemented as reversals (inverse entry signals). Strategy is context-dependent (both long and short entries). Original source text was truncated and provided no additional parameter clarity.
